calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. There being no appearance the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff Pro Per Waymon Wilson is sanctioned $400.00. OSC is reset to Oct-04-2022. Judge Samuel K. Feng; Clerk J.Lee Procedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 9, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
